notes: Applied to every module in modules.json — in EVERY mode including pilot (it is the SMA floor). Items default to M0.

steps.title: Write module charter for {name}
steps.description: Create tasklists/{slug}/_MODULE.md: ownership paths, lane default, gates, graph location, hot-path borders.

steps.title: Register {name} ownership in sma.gen3.json
steps.description: Add/verify {name} module ownership paths in sma.gen3.json; no path overlaps with other modules.

steps.title: Graphify module graph for {name}
steps.description: Refresh/create the Graphify module graph for {name} so agents can query before broad reads.
acceptance_criteria: graph exists and answers a sample ownership question

steps.title: Test harness and CI wiring for {name}
steps.description: Ensure {name} has a runnable module-scoped test command wired into affected-CI so single-module lanes gate locally.
acceptance_criteria: module test command exists and runs in CI on affected changes

steps.title: Telemetry coverage baseline for {name}
steps.description: Audit {name} for silent catches and ignored promise failures; wire all real errors into the project telemetry with area/severity/context.

steps.title: Performance budgets for {name}
steps.description: Define {name}-specific budgets in 07-PERFORMANCE-PLAN.md terms and add the measuring check to CI.
acceptance_criteria: budget documented and measured in CI

steps.title: Module docs baseline for {name}
steps.description: Document {name}: responsibility, public seams, how to run/test it locally.
